vpEntries.content: Oho... Towarzystwo.
Oh ... Society.
Looks like we got company...
No dobra... Chwila prawdy.
Okay ... A moment of truth.
Moment of truth. Here goes...
Co... Co to jest, do cholery?
What ... What the hell is that?
Wha... what the hell is this?
What... what the hell is this?
No jak to, co. Brancesi, 2021. "Impresja numer osiemnaście", olej na płótnie.
Well, what. Brancesi, 2021, Impresja number eighteen, oil on canvas.
What's it looks like? Brancesi, twenty twenty-one, "Untitled number eighteen," oil on canvas.
Naprawdę... Perły przed wieprze.
Really ... Pearls before swine.
Sheesh... pearls before swine.
Zabić ją! Zabić, kurwa!
Zabić go! Zabić, kurwa!
Kill her! Kill, fuck!
Kill him! Kill, fuck!
Neutralize him!
Neutralize her!
Potrzebuję dwóch minut. Oczy dookoła głowy.
I need two minutes. Eyes around the head.
I need two minutes. Keep your eyes peeled.
Tak jest.
This is.
Understood.
Intruz! Mamy intruza!
Intruder! We have an intruder!
Intruder! We've got a break-in!
Ale... Co to, do cholery, robiło na księżycu?
But ... What the hell did it do on the moon?
But... what the hell was this doin' on the moon?
But... the hell was this doin' on the moon?
Jak to, co. Zdobiło stację orbitalną jakiegoś bogacza. Połowa Luwru wylądowała w kosmosie.
Like what. It decorated an orbital station of some rich man. Half of the Louvre has landed in space.
Why else? Some bougie prick hung it on his wall. Half the Louvre's floating in space.
Byłeś tam kiedyś?
Have you been there?
You ever been there?
Haha! Oj, dziewczyno, masz mylne wyobrażenia o tym, ile zarabiają muzycy rockowi...
Haha! Oj, chłopie, masz mylne wyobrażenia o tym, ile zarabiają muzycy rockowi...
Haha! Oh, girl, you have wrong ideas about how much rock musicians earn ...
Haha! Oh, man, you have the wrong ideas about how much rock musicians earn ...
Pah! With the chump change I got screamin' into a mic? Yeah, in my dreams...
Dobra, zbierajmy się stąd, zanim zrobi się tu tłoczno. A ten obraz... Myślę, że bez problemu znajdziesz kupca.
Okay, let's get together before it gets crowded. And this picture ... I think you'll find a buyer without a problem.
All right, let's bail before heads start rollin'. As for the painting... you'll have buyers linin' up in no time.
No proszę. Nie wiedziałam, że taki z ciebie koneser sztuki.
No proszę. Nie wiedziałem, że taki z ciebie koneser sztuki.
Well well. I did not know that you were such a connoisseur of art.
Well well. I did not know that you are such a connoisseur of art.
Well, well. Who knew Johnny Silverhand's a lover of fine art?
Well, well, who knew Johnny Silverhand's a lover of fine art?
Nie jestem. Ale miałem kiedyś dziewczynę, która była malarką. Miała zdrowo nasrane pod kopułą, ale seks, mówię ci...
I'm not. But I once had a girl who was a painter. She had healthy sucked under the dome, but sex, I'm telling you ...
Not me – one of my exes. She was a painter. Bona fide psycho, like all of 'em. The sex, though... Can't even begin to describe it...
Nie mów. Bardzo cię proszę.
Do not speak. I am asking you very much.
Yeah, I'd really rather you didn't...
What the hell is it doing on the moon?
Ale co ten obraz robił na księżycu?
What was this doing on the moon?
I did not know that you were such a connoisseur of art.
Taki z ciebie koneser sztuki?
Now you're an art expert?
